name: @qaroom/moderator-agent
description: Turbo passthrough for the Python moderator-agent service. The real toolchain is uv; these scripts let `turbo run typecheck|test` and the per-service filter reach Python (ADR-0018).

scripts.lint: uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
